profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT LCK Global Kedaton Tbk engages in the provision of telecommunications and engineering services in Indonesia. The company undertakes construction, mechanical, and electrical services for the development of telecommunications towers. It also offers support services for telecommunications sector. The company was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in Jakarta Pusat, Indonesia. PT LCK Global Kedaton Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT LCK Investama Prima Indonesia.
